DatasetTitle: NATIONAL IDENTITY (CLASSIFICATION 1) BY KNOWLEDGE OF ULSTER-SCOTS
StatisticalPopulations: All usual residents aged 3 and over
Annotations: 1.'EU' is the European Union and is as defined on Census day (27 March 2011).; 2. An ability to speak, read or write Ulster-Scots does not imply an ability to understand Ulster-Scots unless stated. Persons in these categories may or may not have the ability to understand Ulster-Scots.;
